title: Snowstorm Saturday
recap:
# Snowstorm Saturday

Power stayed on, snacks did not. We improvised with toast and still played six rounds.

- Poker table ended at 2:10 AM
- Darts final was decided on double 8
- New house rule: no chip splashing
highlights: Gabe hit a river straight to steal the pot.
Farah closed the darts leg from 54.
Brooke won three blackjack shoes in a row.

title: Hearts and Hustle
recap: Hearts dominated the night with rotating partners and loud score updates.
highlights: Noah shot the moon in round 4.
Priya corrected a scoring dispute instantly.
Ian and Olive forced a tiebreaker.

title: March Madness Mix
recap: We tested new game rotations and added The Game as a running side challenge.
highlights: Jules triggered The Game chain reaction.
Leo took out 112 in darts.
Dana called exact Oh Heck bids twice.

title: Spring Showdown
recap: Poker and ping pong split the room all evening.
highlights: Ian won 11-2 in ping pong semifinal.
Kira won a 5-way poker all-in.
Maya captured the best photo set so far.

title: May Long Weekend Cup
recap: Outdoor setup with darts, ping pong, and lightning-fast card rounds.
highlights: Farah and Leo traded perfect darts checkouts.
Olive won back-to-back Hearts tables.
Alex took final poker table with pocket queens.

title: Game Night - Sep 23, 2023
recap:
# Game Night - Sep 23, 2023

A fun night of Sequence and Poker!
highlights: Jeremy won 5 games and 3 series in Sequence.
Clark, Mitch, and Jake tied for 2nd place in Sequence with 4 games and 1 series each.
Jeremy won Poker, with Clark taking 2nd place.

title: Game Night - May 2, 2026
recap:
# Game Night - May 2, 2026

An exciting Poker game with a surprising comeback!
highlights: Jake won the last three hands to secure victory.
Clark came in second place.
John finished third.
Aaron and Jeremy tied for fourth place.

title: Game Night - Jul 20, 2024
recap:
# Game Night - Jul 20, 2024

A thrilling night of Poker and Canadian Salad!
highlights: Aaron was out first in Poker but bought back in.
Brandon won three all-in hands in a row before losing to Jake.
Jake won Poker, with Ben coming in second and Mitch third.
Aaron dominated Canadian Salad, with Clark and Brandon following.

title: Game Night - June 10, 2023
recap:
# Game Night - June 10, 2023

A competitive Sequence game with close results!
highlights: Mitch took first place in Sequence.
Jake and Jeremy tied for second place.
Clark finished third.

title: Game Night - Feb 4, 2023
recap:
# Game Night - Feb 4, 2023

A night of Canadian Salad, Poker, and Hearts with exciting moments!
highlights: Brandon won Canadian Salad with just 30 points.
John won Poker with $60 on the river.
Mitch won $60 in Hearts, while John stayed at 98 for 4 hands.
